title: あなたと行きたい場所

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out together, Special Week and I
return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm getting used to hanging out with you
like this.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But there are still so many things I want us to do
together! Like...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about how you'd react to being on a
roller coaster or in a haunted house really makes
me wanna go.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm not so good with scary things, but there's
something about the thrill of it all...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't you dare sneak up on me in the
haunted house!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oooh, hiking! That didn't even cross my mind!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That'd definitely help me train both my body and
soul!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Let's pack some lunches so we can eat
while admiring the mountain scenery!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Leave lunch to me! You might not know this, but I
make these great little sausages that look like
octopuses! Hehe!
